heading: Refusal of clearance
label: 44105 Refusal of clearance
text: The Secretary of Homeland Security shall refuse the clearance required by , at the port or place of departure from the United States, of a vessel that is subject to this chapter and does not have evidence issued by the Federal Maritime Commission of compliance with sections 44102 and 44103 of this title.section 60105 of this title
